title: Panel – Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research? – #SMSociety 2026
snippet: An event announcement listing Fabio Giglietto as a key panelist alongside other global internet studies experts. He participated in this Glasgow roundtable to address academic challenges, data access, and public-interest research in the transition from CrowdTangle to the Meta Content Library.
description: Fabio Giglietto is featured as a panelist for the 'Meta Content Library Community Roundtable' at the International Conference on Social Media & Society 2026.

title: #SMSociety 2026 Conference Programme
snippet: An official event schedule showing Fabio Giglietto as a panelist at the Meta Content Library Community Roundtable titled 'Where to for Social Media Research?' during the 2026 Social Media and Society Conference in Glasgow.
description: Fabio Giglietto is featured as a panelist at the Meta Content Library Community Roundtable during the 2026 Social Media and Society Conference in Glasgow.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino
description: News article from Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: This article discusses the public and political fallout from Giglietto's 'A Pretty Blunt Approach' study. It reports on how his findings were featured in an investigative episode of the television show 'Report' on Rai 3 and serves as the primary basis for a formal inquiry and parliamentary question submitted to the European Parliament regarding Meta's systemic risk mitigation.
description: An article discussing the political and public fallout of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms, including its feature on Rai3's 'Report' and subsequent European Parliament inquiries.

title: La schedatura dei docenti, l’antifascismo e il tarlo della scuola del ’68 - Centro Studi Sereno Regis
description: News article from Centro Studi Sereno Regis

title: L'articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook
snippet: An analytical piece on digital free speech and constitutional rights in Italy that relies heavily on Giglietto's research concerning Facebook's political content reduction policy.
description: An opinion piece analyzing digital free speech in Italy that heavily cites Fabio Giglietto's research on the impacts of Facebook's political content reduction policy.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews
Meno contenuti politici nei feed, la stretta di Meta è stata meno efficace contro gli estremisti - Il Sole 24 ORE
description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: The piece covers the newly published research by Professor Fabio Giglietto on the democratic impacts of Meta's political content policies. Giglietto is quoted explaining how the algorithmic suppression was highly counterproductive, disproportionately penalizing mainstream elected officials while failing to stop extremist actors.
description: An article discussing a study by Professor Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino on how Facebook's algorithm penalizes mainstream political content while boosting anti-European extremists.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme - Open
